description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a tan and black color scheme, equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming. The stock is adjustable and robust, providing ergonomic support for the user, while the pistol grip ensures a secure hold. The handguard is fitted with accessory rails and a visible angled foregrip in orange, enhancing control and customization options. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a suppressor, indicating a focus on stealth and reduced muzzle flash. The rifle also includes a detachable box magazine and a secondary sighting device mounted forward of the main scope. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer components, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a tan and black finish, equipped with a scope, suppressor, adjustable stock, and orange angled foregrip. Features include accessory rails, detachable magazine, and ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, barrel alignment, and partial visibility of the scope and foregrip.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, scope, angled foregrip, adjustable stock, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the scope and handguard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the scope, angled foregrip, suppressor, and the overall tactical configuration.
